entry.title: Sara Ali Khan का इसके पहले नहीं देखा होगा ऐसा Look Sara Ali Khan Killer Look Boldsky

link.title: Sara Ali Khan का इसके पहले नहीं देखा होगा ऐसा Look Sara Ali Khan Killer Look Boldsky

entry.content:
Bollywood actress Sara Ali Khan is always in the news for her amazing dressing style, but for the last two days, the actress has been engaged in giving back-to-back stylish goals. Yes, sometimes Sara looks like a stylish school girl wearing a red polka dot dress and sometimes she looks like a disco girl in a shimmering metallic dress.
बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस सारा अली खान यूं तो हमेशा ही अपनी कमाल की ड्रेसिंग स्टाइल को लेकर खबरों में बनी रहती हैं लेकिन बीते दो दिनों से अभिनेत्री बैक-टू-बैक स्टाइलिश गोल्स देने में लगी हुई हैं। जी हां, कभी सारा लाल पोल्का डॉट ड्रेस पहन स्टाइलिश स्कूल गर्ल की तरह दिखाई देती हैं तो कभी झिलमिलाती मेटैलिक ड्रेस में उनका लुक एकदम डिस्को गर्ल वाला होता है।
#Saraalikhan #Saradress #Killerlook
entry.summary: Bollywood actress Sara Ali Khan is always in the news for her amazing dressing style, but for the last two days, the actress has been engaged in giving back-to-back stylish goals. Yes, sometimes Sara looks like a stylish school girl wearing a red polka dot dress and sometimes she looks like a disco girl in a shimmering metallic dress. बॉलीवुड एक्ट्रेस सारा अली खान यूं तो हमेशा ही अपनी कमाल की ड्रेसिंग स्टाइल को लेकर खबरों में बनी रहती हैं लेकिन बीते दो दिनों से अभिनेत्री बैक-टू-बैक स्टाइलिश गोल्स देने में लगी हुई हैं। जी हां, कभी सारा लाल पोल्का डॉट ड्रेस पहन स्टाइलिश स्कूल गर्ल की तरह दिखाई देती हैं तो कभी झिलमिलाती मेटैलिक ड्रेस में उनका लुक एकदम डिस्को गर्ल वाला होता है। #Saraalikhan #Saradress #Killerlook

entry.title: Wynonna Earp : Season 4 Episode 6 ~ CHCH-DT

link.title: Wynonna Earp : Season 4 Episode 6 ~ CHCH-DT

entry.content:
Wynonna Earp Season 4 Episode 6 : Holy War (2)
Click Here : [[ ]]
Storyline :
The gang races to save one of their own, but are hindered by unseen forces.
Genre: Action & Adventure, Sci-Fi & Fantasy, Western
Network : CHCH-DT
Cast: Melanie Scrofano (Wynonna Earp), Tim Rozon (John Henry ‘Doc’ Holliday), Dominique Provost-Chalkley (Waverly Earp), Kat Barrell (Nicole Haught), Varun Saranga (Jeremy Chetri)

entry.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 19) 16x9 - Strangers on the Shore - Pt 2 - 1981

link.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 19) 16x9 - Strangers on the Shore - Pt 2 - 1981

entry.content:
Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold.
Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich.
After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald).
The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.
entry.summary: Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold. Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich. After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald). The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.

entry.title: JACKIE ORMES – CARTOONIST, jackie ormes the first african american woman cartoonist,

link.title: JACKIE ORMES – CARTOONIST, jackie ormes the first african american woman cartoonist,

entry.content: At a time when America’s media depicted the black population in a generally derogatory way, Jackie Ormes challenged the status quo, flouted the stereotypes, and provided bright and brilliant role models in her work. She was an inspiration, a trailblazer, and an incredible agent of change.
entry.summary: At a time when America’s media depicted the black population in a generally derogatory way, Jackie Ormes challenged the status quo, flouted the stereotypes, and provided bright and brilliant role models in her work. She was an inspiration, a trailblazer, and an incredible agent of change.

entry.title: Hong Kong launches universal Covid-19 tests for residents

link.title: Hong Kong launches universal Covid-19 tests for residents

entry.content: Hong Kong residents began the en masse testing process for the coronavirus as the city’s government launched its universal screening programme on September 1, 2020, despite calls from activists and some health workers for a boycott. There are 141 sample collecting centres across all 18 districts and the programme will last at least one week. (Photo: SCMP / Felix Wong)
entry.summary: Hong Kong residents began the en masse testing process for the coronavirus as the city’s government launched its universal screening programme on September 1, 2020, despite calls from activists and some health workers for a boycott. There are 141 sample collecting centres across all 18 districts and the programme will last at least one week. (Photo: SCMP / Felix Wong)

entry.title: InfiernoRojo TV #72 - #VosSosMiVida

link.title: InfiernoRojo TV #72 - #VosSosMiVida

entry.content: Dentro de un mercado de pases totalmente trabado y sin caras nuevas, un analista de la vida de Independiente se sienta para charlar con InfiernoRojo TV. El enorme Daniel Bertoni, campeón de todo con el Rojo y con Argentina, más que  autorizado para volcar sus ideas sobre la actualidad del fútbol. ¡Sentilo!
entry.summary: Dentro de un mercado de pases totalmente trabado y sin caras nuevas, un analista de la vida de Independiente se sienta para charlar con InfiernoRojo TV. El enorme Daniel Bertoni, campeón de todo con el Rojo y con Argentina, más que autorizado para volcar sus ideas sobre la actualidad del fútbol. ¡Sentilo!

entry.title: US Open 2020 - Kim Clijsters : ‘I feel ready to compete in the US Open and my stomach is much better’

link.title: US Open 2020 - Kim Clijsters : ‘I feel ready to compete in the US Open and my stomach is much better’

entry.content:
Kim Clijsters se sent prête à disputer l’US Open, qui commence la semaine prochaine à New York. L’ancienne N.1 mondiale, qui effectue cette année son retour à la compétition, a souffert de douleurs abdominales ces dernières semaines. "Mon estomac va beaucoup mieux", a-t-elle déclaré à WTA Insider.
Clijsters avait participé au World Team Tennis, un tournoi de tennis par équipes, mais avait dû abandonner après quelques belles victoires. Elle avait ensuite fait l’impasse sur le tournoi de Cincinnati. Clijsters affrontera la Russe Ekaterina Alexandrova (WTA 27) au premier tour de l’US Open. "Au WTT, j’ai senti que mon niveau était monté là où je le voulais. J’ai eu l’impression d’avoir joué un très bon tennis. J’espère que je pourrai faire passer ça ici pendant les matchs."
entry.summary: Kim Clijsters se sent prête à disputer l’US Open, qui commence la semaine prochaine à New York. L’ancienne N.1 mondiale, qui effectue cette année son retour à la compétition, a souffert de douleurs abdominales ces dernières semaines. "Mon estomac va beaucoup mieux", a-t-elle déclaré à WTA Insider. Clijsters avait participé au World Team Tennis, un tournoi de tennis par équipes, mais avait dû abandonner après quelques belles victoires. Elle avait ensuite fait l’impasse sur le tournoi de Cincinnati. Clijsters affrontera la Russe Ekaterina Alexandrova (WTA 27) au premier tour de l’US Open. "Au WTT, j’ai senti que mon niveau était monté là où je le voulais. J’ai eu l’impression d’avoir joué un très bon tennis. J’espère que je pourrai faire passer ça ici pendant les matchs."

entry.title: Qui sont les 14 accusés du procès des attentats de janvier 2015 ?

link.title: Qui sont les 14 accusés du procès des attentats de janvier 2015 ?

entry.content: Dix-sept morts. Deux lieux : Charlie Hebdo et l’Hyper Cacher. Trois jours, les 7, 8 et 9 janvier 2015. Trois terroristes, les frères Kouachi et Amédy Coulibaly. S’ouvre aujourd’hui à Paris le procès de leurs comparses. Au terme de l’enquête judiciaire, ils sont quatorze au total à avoir participé d’une façon ou d’une autre aux attaques de janvier 2015. Mais trois sont absents du box, les frères Belhoucine et Hayat Boumeddiene, enfuis en Syrie juste avant les attentats. Restent les onze qui sont attendus dans la salle d‘audience du palais de justice de Paris. 14 accusés sont renvoyés devant les assises mais seulement 11 seront présents, les 3 restants sont en fuite. Visés par un mandat d’arrêt International. Il s’agit d’Hayat Boumédienne, compagne d’Amedy Coulibaly et les frères Belhoucine qui l’ont aidé à fuir en Syrie n’ont jamais été interpellé. Parmi les 11 présents : des hommes de 30 à 67 ans. Ils risquent pour la plupart jusqu’à vingt ans de prison, pour association de malfaiteurs terroriste, mais deux d’entre eux encourent la perpétuité, car ils sont jugés également pour complicité de crimes.
entry.summary: Dix-sept morts. Deux lieux : Charlie Hebdo et l’Hyper Cacher. Trois jours, les 7, 8 et 9 janvier 2015. Trois terroristes, les frères Kouachi et Amédy Coulibaly. S’ouvre aujourd’hui à Paris le procès de leurs comparses. Au terme de l’enquête judiciaire, ils sont quatorze au total à avoir participé d’une façon ou d’une autre aux attaques de janvier 2015. Mais trois sont absents du box, les frères Belhoucine et Hayat Boumeddiene, enfuis en Syrie juste avant les attentats. Restent les onze qui sont attendus dans la salle d‘audience du palais de justice de Paris. 14 accusés sont renvoyés devant les assises mais seulement 11 seront présents, les 3 restants sont en fuite. Visés par un mandat d’arrêt International. Il s’agit d’Hayat Boumédienne, compagne d’Amedy Coulibaly et les frères Belhoucine qui l’ont aidé à fuir en Syrie n’ont jamais été interpellé. Parmi les 11 présents : des hommes de 30 à 67 ans. Ils risquent pour la plupart jusqu’à vingt ans de prison, pour association de malfaiteurs terroriste, mais deux d’entre eux encourent la perpétuité, car ils sont jugés également pour complicité de crimes.

entry.title: Sushant’s family lawyer Vs Rhea Chakraborty’s lawyer

link.title: Sushant’s family lawyer Vs Rhea Chakraborty’s lawyer

entry.content: Vikas Singh, Sushant Singh Rajput’s family’s lawyer addressed the media in a press conference and said that the family is very disturbed as they feel a campaign is being run to malign their image. He also said that the sisters were forced by Mumbai Police to sign on statements written in Marathi. Hence, they did not know what was being written.
entry.summary: Vikas Singh, Sushant Singh Rajput’s family’s lawyer addressed the media in a press conference and said that the family is very disturbed as they feel a campaign is being run to malign their image. He also said that the sisters were forced by Mumbai Police to sign on statements written in Marathi. Hence, they did not know what was being written.

entry.title: Recyclage : Veolia veut devenir le numéro un mondial

link.title: Recyclage : Veolia veut devenir le numéro un mondial

entry.content:
Veolia a annoncé dimanche 30 août son intention de racheter Suez, son rival et numéro deux du secteur. L’objectif est de créer un champion français numéro un mondial de la transformation écologique.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Veolia a annoncé dimanche 30 août son intention de racheter Suez, son rival et numéro deux du secteur. L’objectif est de créer un champion français numéro un mondial de la transformation écologique. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Lionel Jospin, ex-Premier ministre, évoque, chez Jean-Luc Mélenchon, le conflit entre l’intelligence et le tempérament : ‘Je regarde les Insoumis avec sympathie et sans effroi’

link.title: Lionel Jospin, ex-Premier ministre, évoque, chez Jean-Luc Mélenchon, le conflit entre l’intelligence et le tempérament : ‘Je regarde les Insoumis avec sympathie et sans effroi’

entry.content: L’ancien Premier ministre Lionel Jospin est l’invité du Grand Entretien de Léa Salamé et Nicolas Demorand. Il signe "Un temps troublé" aux éditions du Seuil. Plus d’info:
entry.summary: L’ancien Premier ministre Lionel Jospin est l’invité du Grand Entretien de Léa Salamé et Nicolas Demorand. Il signe "Un temps troublé" aux éditions du Seuil. Plus d’info:

entry.title: ‘Resident Evil’ Series Lands at Netflix

link.title: ‘Resident Evil’ Series Lands at Netflix

entry.content: The small screen adaptation of the dystopian zombie movie franchise is heading to Netflix with ‘The Walking Dead’ director tapped for the first two episodes. Aug 28, 2020  AceShowbiz - A series inspired by the blockbuster movie franchise "Resident Evil" is officially a go at Netflix.   Written by "Supernatural" co-showrunner Andrew Dabb and produced by executives at Constantin Film, the team behind the dystopian zombie films, the show will feature all new story lines.       Based on the massively successful 1996 video game, the big screen adaptation of "Resident Evil" debuted in 2002 and spawned six films, all starring Milla Jovovich. The franchise wrapped in 2016 with "Resident Evil: The Final Chapter".   "Resident Evil is my favorite game of all time," Dabb, who will serve as showrunner, said in a statement. "I’m incredibly excited to tell a new chapter in this amazing story and bring the first ever Resident Evil series to Netflix members around the world."   Bronwen Hughes, …
entry.summary: The small screen adaptation of the dystopian zombie movie franchise is heading to Netflix with ‘The Walking Dead’ director tapped for the first two episodes. Aug 28, 2020 AceShowbiz - A series inspired by the blockbuster movie franchise "Resident Evil" is officially a go at Netflix. Written by "Supernatural" co-showrunner Andrew Dabb and produced by executives at Constantin Film, the team behind the dystopian zombie films, the show will feature all new story lines. Based on the massively successful 1996 video game, the big screen adaptation of "Resident Evil" debuted in 2002 and spawned six films, all starring Milla Jovovich. The franchise wrapped in 2016 with "Resident Evil: The Final Chapter". "Resident Evil is my favorite game of all time," Dabb, who will serve as showrunner, said in a statement. "I’m incredibly excited to tell a new chapter in this amazing story and bring the first ever Resident Evil series to Netflix members around the world." Bronwen Hughes, …

entry.title: Un autobus en feu à Nanterre

link.title: Un autobus en feu à Nanterre

entry.content: L’incendie a débuté vers 16 heures alors que l’engin se trouvait à un arrêt, à hauteur du numéro 290 de l’avenue Georges-Clémenceau, en direction de Paris. La Brigade des sapeurs-pompiers de Paris (BSPP) a reçu l’alerte à 16h08. Depuis elle est à pied d’œuvre pour éteindre le feu, mais aussi pour s’assurer que les fumées ne s’engouffrent pas dans un bâtiment voisin de l’autobus en feu. Les sapeurs-pompiers se sont rendus sur place avec trois camions.
entry.summary: L’incendie a débuté vers 16 heures alors que l’engin se trouvait à un arrêt, à hauteur du numéro 290 de l’avenue Georges-Clémenceau, en direction de Paris. La Brigade des sapeurs-pompiers de Paris (BSPP) a reçu l’alerte à 16h08. Depuis elle est à pied d’œuvre pour éteindre le feu, mais aussi pour s’assurer que les fumées ne s’engouffrent pas dans un bâtiment voisin de l’autobus en feu. Les sapeurs-pompiers se sont rendus sur place avec trois camions.

entry.title: JEE-Main Exam 2020 Guidelines: Candidates Must Follow Rules JEE-Main Exam 2020 Guidelines

link.title: JEE-Main Exam 2020 Guidelines: Candidates Must Follow Rules JEE-Main Exam 2020 Guidelines

entry.content:
Engineering entrance exam, JEE-Main exams began in the country on Sept 01. The candidates reached to their respective exam centers with mask on amid COVID-19 pandemic. They were seen queuing outside the exam centers at various places. They were provided hand sanitizers at the examination centers. Candidates were allowed in the exam halls with valid admit cards. Body temperature was also being checked of the candidates. Engineering entrance exam, JEE-Main, scheduled to be held from September 1 to 6.
#JEEMainExams
#EngineeringEntranceExam
#JEEMainExam2020
#NEET2020
#JEEadmitcards
#JointEntranceExam
#COVID19
#JEEMainExam2020Guidelines
#examcenters
#handsanitizers
#MinistryofEducation
#జేఈఈ మెయిన్స్‌
ఇంటర్ తర్వాత ఇంజనీరింగ్‌ కోర్సుల కోసం దేశవ్యాప్తంగా అర్హత పరీక్ష జాయింట్ ఎంట్రన్స్ ఎగ్జామినేషన్ (జేఈఈ) మెయిన్స్‌ నేటి నుంచి ప్రారంభం కాబోతోంది. ఈ ఏడాది ఏప్రిల్-మే నెలలో నిర్వహించాల్సిన పరీక్ష కరోనా వైరస్ వల్ల వాయిదా పడుతూ వస్తోంది. సెప్టెంబర్‌ ఒకటో తేదీ నుంచి ఆరో తేదీ వరకు దేశ వ్యాప్తంగా పరీక్షలు జరగబోతున్నాయి. ఉదయం, మధ్యాహ్నం రెండు పేపర్లు ఉంటాయి. గంట ముందుగానే పరీక్ష కేంద్రానికి చేరుకోవాలి. నిర్ణీత సమయం దాటిన తర్వాత నిమిషం ఆలస్యమైనా అనుమతించమని అధికారులు స్పష్టంచేశారు. ఉదయం 9-12 వరకు, మధ్యాహ్నం 3-6 వరకు పరీక్షను నిర్వహిస్తారు.
entry.summary: Engineering entrance exam, JEE-Main exams began in the country on Sept 01. The candidates reached to their respective exam centers with mask on amid COVID-19 pandemic. They were seen queuing outside the exam centers at various places. They were provided hand sanitizers at the examination centers. Candidates were allowed in the exam halls with valid admit cards. Body temperature was also being checked of the candidates. Engineering entrance exam, JEE-Main, scheduled to be held from September 1 to 6. #JEEMainExams #EngineeringEntranceExam #JEEMainExam2020 #NEET2020 #JEEadmitcards #JointEntranceExam #COVID19 #JEEMainExam2020Guidelines #examcenters #handsanitizers #MinistryofEducation #జేఈఈ మెయిన్స్‌ ఇంటర్ తర్వాత ఇంజనీరింగ్‌ కోర్సుల కోసం దేశవ్యాప్తంగా అర్హత పరీక్ష జాయింట్ ఎంట్రన్స్ ఎగ్జామినేషన్ (జేఈఈ) మెయిన్స్‌ నేటి నుంచి ప్రారంభం కాబోతోంది. ఈ ఏడాది ఏప్రిల్-మే నెలలో నిర్వహించాల్సిన పరీక్ష కరోనా వైరస్ వల్ల వాయిదా పడుతూ వస్తోంది. సెప్టెంబర్‌ ఒకటో తేదీ నుంచి ఆరో తేదీ వరకు దేశ వ్యాప్తంగా పరీక్షలు జరగబోతున్నాయి. ఉదయం, మధ్యాహ్నం రెండు పేపర్లు ఉంటాయి. గంట ముందుగానే పరీక్ష కేంద్రానికి చేరుకోవాలి. నిర్ణీత సమయం దాటిన తర్వాత నిమిషం ఆలస్యమైనా అనుమతించమని అధికారులు స్పష్టంచేశారు. ఉదయం 9-12 వరకు, మధ్యాహ్నం 3-6 వరకు పరీక్షను నిర్వహిస్తారు.

entry.title: Coronavirus in India : दुनिया में दूसरा सबसे ज़्यादा Corona Test करने वाला देश India वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus in India : दुनिया में दूसरा सबसे ज़्यादा Corona Test करने वाला देश India वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
India is also among the most investigated countries in the world every day. Health Secretary Rajesh Bhushan said that this week we have done more than four and a half crore tests. There is only one country in the world that has done more tests than us. The Union Health Ministry has said that a record number of 11,72,179 samples were tested on Wednesday to find Covid-19 cases in the country and a total of 4,55,09,380 have been tested so far.
विश्व में प्रतिदिन सर्वाधिक जांच करने वाले देशों में भारत भी शामिल है. स्वास्थ्य सचिव राजेश भूषण ने कहा कि इस सप्ताह में हमने साढ़े चार करोड़ से ज्यादा टेस्ट कर लिए हैं. दुनिया में एक ही देश है जिसने हमसे ज्यादा टेस्ट किए हैं. केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्रालय ने कहा है कि देश में Covid-19 के मामलों का पता लगाने के लिए बुधवार को रिकार्ड संख्या में 11,72,179 नमूनों की जांच की गई और अब तक कुल 4,55,09,380 जांच की जा चुकी है.
#Coronavirus #CoronaTest #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: India is also among the most investigated countries in the world every day. Health Secretary Rajesh Bhushan said that this week we have done more than four and a half crore tests. There is only one country in the world that has done more tests than us. The Union Health Ministry has said that a record number of 11,72,179 samples were tested on Wednesday to find Covid-19 cases in the country and a total of 4,55,09,380 have been tested so far. विश्व में प्रतिदिन सर्वाधिक जांच करने वाले देशों में भारत भी शामिल है. स्वास्थ्य सचिव राजेश भूषण ने कहा कि इस सप्ताह में हमने साढ़े चार करोड़ से ज्यादा टेस्ट कर लिए हैं. दुनिया में एक ही देश है जिसने हमसे ज्यादा टेस्ट किए हैं. केंद्रीय स्वास्थ्य मंत्रालय ने कहा है कि देश में Covid-19 के मामलों का पता लगाने के लिए बुधवार को रिकार्ड संख्या में 11,72,179 नमूनों की जांच की गई और अब तक कुल 4,55,09,380 जांच की जा चुकी है. #Coronavirus #CoronaTest #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Coronavirus : quand le masque empêche de travailler

link.title: Coronavirus : quand le masque empêche de travailler

entry.content:
Travailler en temps de coronavirus représente un défi pour des milliers de salariés. Tous vont devoir porter le masque à partir du mardi 1er septembre. Peu de dérogations sont accordées, et pourtant pour certaines professions, il est impossible de travailler avec un masque. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Travailler en temps de coronavirus représente un défi pour des milliers de salariés. Tous vont devoir porter le masque à partir du mardi 1er septembre. Peu de dérogations sont accordées, et pourtant pour certaines professions, il est impossible de travailler avec un masque. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: ‘Why did you shoot him’: Protesters shout at armed civilian running down street in Kenosha

link.title: ‘Why did you shoot him’: Protesters shout at armed civilian running down street in Kenosha

entry.content:
Police in Kenosha said two people have died and one was injured after shots were fired during the third night of unrest over Jacob Blake’s shooting.
Footage filmed on Tuesday night (August 25) shows an armed civilian running as protesters can be heard shouting in the background: "Why did you shoot him? Why did you shoot him?"
A video shared on Twitter shows what appears to be the same man standing outside the car dealership "Car Source" before shots are heard. The armed man is then seen fleeing the scene, while an injured man lies on the ground.
Video footage obtained by Newsflare shows the injured protester being taken to hospital.
Further footage shared on social media of a second incident shows what also appears to be the same man being chased down the street by a group of protesters, he then falls to the ground and discharges his weapon multiple times towards civilians, hitting some. He then carries on running before he eventually gets to a police roadblock.
Kenosha Police Department released a statement: "On August 25, 2020, at about 11:45 pm Kenosha Police, along with assisting agencies, responded to the area of 63rd Street and Sheridan Road for reports of shots being fired and multiple gunshot victims.
"The shooting resulted in two fatalities and a third gunshot victim was transported to a hospital with serious, but non-life threatening injuries.
The shooting investigation is active an ongoing.
"No further details regarding the shooting will be released at this time.
"The names, ages and cities of residence for the victims are still being determined."
Sheriff David Beth of Kenosha Police Department told The New York Times that their investigation has been focused on a group of men with guns and the conflict between them and protesters.
entry.summary: Police in Kenosha said two people have died and one was injured after shots were fired during the third night of unrest over Jacob Blake’s shooting. Footage filmed on Tuesday night (August 25) shows an armed civilian running as protesters can be heard shouting in the background: "Why did you shoot him? Why did you shoot him?" A video shared on Twitter shows what appears to be the same man standing outside the car dealership "Car Source" before shots are heard. The armed man is then seen fleeing the scene, while an injured man lies on the ground. Video footage obtained by Newsflare shows the injured protester being taken to hospital. Further footage shared on social media of a second incident shows what also appears to be the same man being chased down the street by a group of protesters, he then falls to the ground and discharges his weapon multiple times towards civilians, hitting some. He then carries on running before he eventually gets to a police roadblock. Kenosha Police Department released a statement: "On August 25, 2020, at about 11:45 pm Kenosha Police, along with assisting agencies, responded to the area of 63rd Street and Sheridan Road for reports of shots being fired and multiple gunshot victims. "The shooting resulted in two fatalities and a third gunshot victim was transported to a hospital with serious, but non-life threatening injuries. The shooting investigation is active an ongoing. "No further details regarding the shooting will be released at this time. "The names, ages and cities of residence for the victims are still being determined." Sheriff David Beth of Kenosha Police Department told The New York Times that their investigation has been focused on a group of men with guns and the conflict between them and protesters.

entry.title: The Witcher Le making-of

link.title: The Witcher Le making-of

entry.content: The Witcher Le making-of - Bande-annonce officielle - Rendez-vous sur le Continent et découvrez l’envers du décor de la série The Witcher avec des monstres, des ballades et une bonne dose de magie.
entry.summary: The Witcher Le making-of - Bande-annonce officielle - Rendez-vous sur le Continent et découvrez l’envers du décor de la série The Witcher avec des monstres, des ballades et une bonne dose de magie.

entry.title: Where My Eyes Linger Episode 8

link.title: Where My Eyes Linger Episode 8

entry.content:
Full Episodes:
Korean BL
Synopsis: This series tells the story about Tae Joo, the 18-year-old only successor to the TB Group. He’s blessed with a wealthy family, good looks, and no troubles to worry for often described as a handsome guy in the spotlight. His 18-year-old bodyguard, Goo Koo, has been trained in all different types of martial arts and is physically trained to have a strong body. He’s also very thoughtful, and Tae Joo is his only friend, while Goo Koo is the only person Tae Joo feels as though he can trust, and feels relieved around him.
entry.summary: Full Episodes: Korean BL Synopsis: This series tells the story about Tae Joo, the 18-year-old only successor to the TB Group. He’s blessed with a wealthy family, good looks, and no troubles to worry for often described as a handsome guy in the spotlight. His 18-year-old bodyguard, Goo Koo, has been trained in all different types of martial arts and is physically trained to have a strong body. He’s also very thoughtful, and Tae Joo is his only friend, while Goo Koo is the only person Tae Joo feels as though he can trust, and feels relieved around him.

entry.title: Deli Dish! Here’s Some Advice and Etiquette at the Deli Counter!

link.title: Deli Dish! Here’s Some Advice and Etiquette at the Deli Counter!

entry.content: Have you ever gone to a deli counter and just didn’t know what to do? Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.
entry.summary: Have you ever gone to a deli counter and just didn’t know what to do? Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.
